title: Xiphizusa gladiata

Xiphizusa gladiata is a small tree or shrub with glabrous branches and leaves that are elliptical in shape. The plant is known for its small, white flowers that are arranged in a terminal panicle. Xiphizusa gladiata is considered to be an endangered species due to habitat loss and other environmental factors.
